pi_items.source: setup_task.sh dynamically seeds incident_p1_000001 into CouchDB
setup_task.sh creates incident with description starting with 'Broken Wheelchair in Ward 3'
task description requests 'Resolved'; verifier checks for metadata expected statuses
task description requests adding 'Maintenance replaced the caster wheel'; verifier checks these keywords
setup_task.sh dynamically seeds these distractor IDs into CouchDB

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically seeded data for a HospitalRun instance. It is verified that the target incident (ID 'incident_p1_000001') is created via setup_task.sh with the description 'Broken Wheelchair in Ward 3...'. The distractors 'incident_p1_000002' and 'incident_p1_000003' are also properly seeded. The agent must update the status to match one of the expected statuses (e.g. 'Resolved') and append required resolution keywords ('replaced', 'wheel') to the description, which corresponds exactly to the task description instructions and verifier logic.
